title: Argentine haemorrhagic fever
body: "This rapid systematic review identified and summarised evidence of the epidemiological and clinical characteristics of Argentine haemorrhagic fever (caused by Junin virus).  This rapid systematic review searched for evidence published up to 19 June 2024 and included 27 studies. These included 2 randomised controlled trials, 2 cohort studies, one case control study, 2 cross sectional studies, 1 ecological study, 18 case series and one case report, conducted between 1964 and 2020. "
